watchlist.macro: Sturdy growth and lower inflation backdrop with Fed on hold through 2026, but two-way rate risk from potential 2027 hikes; equity rotation from mega-cap AI into cyclicals, financials, and value expected, with main risks from geopolitical escalation, sticky inflation re-acceleration, or AI capex ROI disappointment.
